backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and manages business inquiries with fields for name, phone, businessType, message, and timestamp. Exposes submitInquiry (with validation) and getAllInquiries functions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping portfolio website features (navigation, hero, about, services, etc.) to their implementing source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of every component, hook, and style file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Debraj Paul Portfolio' that mounts the React app into a root div via the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles all seven page sections (Hero through Contact) along with Navigation, Footer, and the sticky WhatsApp button into a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About Me section displaying a profile photo with decorative borders, bio text, skill tags, location badge, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the Contact section.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact form component with client-side validation for name, phone, business type, and message fields that submits inquiries to the backend canister and shows a success state on completion.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, services list, and contact details (phone, WhatsApp, email) plus a dynamic copyright year and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with headline, subheadline, trust stats, and two CTAs (Get Free Demo scroll and WhatsApp link), featuring decorative background grid and glowing orbs.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a logo, desktop nav buttons, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/PortfolioSection: Portfolio grid displaying three sample demo projects (gym, lawyer, coaching) with images, tags, category badges, and a hover overlay linking to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Three-tier pricing section (Basic ₹2,500, Standard ₹3,500, Premium ₹5,000) with feature lists, a highlighted 'Most Popular' badge on Standard, and WhatsApp CTA buttons.
Services grid showcasing five offerings (website design, landing pages, redesign, WhatsApp integration, SEO) as icon cards, plus a custom-request CTA card.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-right corner with a hover tooltip and pulse animation, linking to a pre-filled WhatsApp chat.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseMeSecti: React component rendering a 'Why Choose Me' section with five benefit cards (48hr delivery, affordable pricing, modern design, WhatsApp support, no hidden charges), each with a colored icon, description, and background number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitInquiry mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitInquiry method and invalidates the inquiries query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and Poppins fonts, defining dark-blue OKLCH CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes, and adding utility classes for gradients, card glow, WhatsApp pulse animation, and nav blur.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, custom fonts (Inter/Poppins), glow box shadows, and animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing Debraj Paul's portfolio website goals, architecture notes, implemented features, image requirements, and known issues for a dark-blue single-page site targeting local Assam businesses.
